Our story
“Clothes that feel like a warm day, whatever the weather.”

Vlora is named after a sun-drenched harbor on the Adriatic, and it began with a simple belief: what you wear should feel like a good morning.

More about our values →

Optimism, woven in

Colors pulled from morning light and cuts that move with you — clothes designed to lift the mood of any room they walk into.

Kind to the earth

100% natural fibers, low-impact dyes and plastic-free packaging. Beautiful days deserve a beautiful planet.

Made to keep

Small-batch craftsmanship, reinforced seams and free repairs for life. The most optimistic thing a garment can do is stay.

Summer 2026

The Sunlit Collection

Twelve weeks of morning light, distilled into six pieces. Warm neutrals, soft sage and sun-baked clay — designed to go everywhere the light does.

Made for golden hours

This collection began on a June morning on the Adriatic coast, watching light move across plaster walls and linen curtains. Every color here is borrowed from that hour: cream from the walls, sage from the olive trees, clay from the rooftops.

Each piece is cut loose enough to move and breathe, and finished to be worn for years — seams reinforced, hems generous, buttons of real corozo nut.

In this collection

Six pieces, endlessly combinable: two shirts, a dress, a knit, a trouser and a handwoven wrap. Every one works with every other — a small wardrobe with big mornings in mind.

Shop all six pieces

Ready to wear the light?

Every piece ships plastic-free, and every seam is guaranteed for life.

Our story

It started with a harbor.

Vlora is named after a sun-drenched port on the Adriatic — a town where laundry lines glow at golden hour and nobody hurries before ten.

A good morning, made wearable

In the summer of 2021, our founder spent a month in that harbor town with one suitcase: three linen shirts, one pair of trousers, a sweater for cool evenings. Nothing matched, everything worked, and every piece came home softer and better loved than it left.

The question that followed us home: why doesn't all clothing feel like that? Not louder every season — just lighter, warmer, more alive in the sun.

So we started making the suitcase, piece by piece. Natural fibers only. Colors borrowed from morning light. Cuts that don't care whether you're working, walking or falling asleep on a ferry.

“We don't design for seasons. We design for mornings.”

Every Vlora piece is tested against one simple standard: does it make the day feel a little brighter to be in?

The road so far

  • 2021

    A suitcase and a sketchbook

    Vlora is founded in a spare bedroom, with fabric swatches pinned to every wall.

  • 2022

    The first forty shirts

    Our first run of Everyday Linens sells out in nine days — thirty-eight of the forty are still being worn today.

  • 2024

    Repairs for life

    We promise free repairs, forever, on everything we make. Our tailors have since brought 1,100 garments back to life.

  • 2026

    The Sunlit Collection

    Six pieces, twelve partner ateliers, and the same rule as day one: make it feel like morning.

“We're a small team, and we like it that way. Every piece is checked by hands, not scanners; every email is answered by a person who probably owns the shirt you're asking about. Thank you for being here — it means more sunlight for everyone who makes what you wear.”

— Elira & the Vlora team

Values

Woven with intention

Three promises, stitched into everything we make — and the receipts to back them up.

Optimism, woven in

Every color in our palette is sampled from real morning light — cream plaster, olive leaves, baked clay. Cuts are loose, forgiving and made for movement, because clothes should meet your day with a yes.

Kind to the earth

European flax linen, organic cotton and undyed knits. Low-impact, GOTS-certified dyes. Offcuts become repair patches and wraps. Packaging is paper, glue-free and prints with soy ink.

Made to keep

Twelve small partner ateliers, paid fairly and credited by name on every care label. Reinforced seams, corozo buttons, and free repairs for life — because the greenest garment is the one that stays.

100%
natural fibers, always
0
plastic in our packaging
12
partner ateliers, credited by name
∞
free repairs, for life

How a Vlora piece is made

  • ✺

    Fibers first

    We start with European flax and organic cotton, chosen for how they age — softer, never sadder.

  • ✺

    Color from the morning

    Low-impact dyes matched to our light-sampled palette; knits are left undyed entirely.

  • ✺

    Cut with room to live

    Patterns are drafted for movement — generous hems, gussets where it counts, nothing that pinches a good day.

  • ✺

    Sewn by named hands

    Each piece is finished in one of twelve ateliers, and the maker's name is on the care label.

  • ✺

    Kept alive, forever

    Free repairs for life. Send it back, we'll mend it, and it comes home with a story stitched in.

Values you can wear

The proof is in the wearing — six pieces, made the slow way.
